# XC Miner

XC Miner specializes in high-performance desktop silent ASIC Bitcoin miners. All products feature open-source firmware, silent cooling, and plug-and-play setup.

## Products
- XC Nano: $49, 500 GH/s, 15W, BM1366 chip, ultra-portable USB-C powered
- XC One: $89, 1.2 TH/s, 22W, BM1368 chip, best value
- XC Pro: $169, 2.8 TH/s, 55W, BM1370 chip, performance tier
- XC Ultra: $289, 5.5 TH/s, 105W, BM1372 ×1 chip, flagship
- XC Max: $499, 11 TH/s, 210W, BM1372 ×2 chip, dual-chip beast

## Key Features
- Open Source Firmware: ESP32-based, AxeOS compatible, full control over pools/frequency/voltage
- Whisper-Quiet: All models under 38dB, custom silent fans with intelligent thermal curves
- Plug & Play: USB-C or DC power, connects via Wi-Fi, no technical background needed
- Real ASIC Chips: Bitmain BM13 series, up to 40% efficiency improvement over previous generation

- Website: https://xcminer.github.io/xcweb/
- WeChat: xc_miner_official
